items.summary: Generate a version of the uploaded logos image (containing Smartway Wellness, AquaLab, Smart Laboratories, Cipla, and Laborate Pharmaceuticals India Ltd.) with a clean white or light neutral background instead of the dark/black background, preserving all logos at full visibility.

In the pharmaceutical partners section of App.tsx, replace any existing individual logo elements or dark-background image with the new light-background combined logos image saved as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Display it in a compact, space-efficient layout with a light/white section background.
